title: Collocations & Upgrades
description: Learn how words combine and upgrade from B1 to B2 language.

pairs.demo: A junk food diet inevitably leads to weight gain.
The majority of crime in Australia stems from drug and alcohol addiction.
This can give rise to greater prejudice.
Parents supporting adult children, resulting in increased costs.
Our changing lifestyles have had a far-reaching effect on our health.
This has a detrimental effect not only on individuals but on society.
This could have a significant positive impact on health.
This can have long-term benefits for their self-esteem.
Investment is crucial to bridge this gap.
There has been a dramatic increase in the amount earned.
The anxiety can be severe.
This effort is ultimately futile.
Education programs can enhance employability.
Poor parenting exacerbates problems at school.
Steps need to be taken to eliminate these energy sources.
Suggest ways to curb bad behaviour.
Many schools are facing a variety of challenges.
There can be no doubt that captive animals suffer.
This debris poses potential risks to future missions.
Children who play can reap benefits which serve them well.

b1_b2_upgrade.b2: The main reason is... / The other factor is...
b1_b2_upgrade.tip: Examiners see 'Firstly, Secondly, Thirdly' as a memorised template. Vary your Point starters.
'Also' is too informal for academic writing. 'In addition to this' shows sophisticated additive cohesion.
'But' at sentence start is too casual. Use 'However' (new sentence) or 'Although' (same sentence).
'So' is conversational. 'As a result' signals academic cause-effect reasoning.
Rotating between 'for instance,' 'Indeed,' and 'Take X as an example' shows Lexical Resource variety.

b1_b2_upgrade.b2: This is because ... / This occurs because ...
b1_b2_upgrade.tip: Starting with 'Because' often creates fragments. 'This is because' is complete and academic.

b1_b2_upgrade.b2: In my view, ... / Personally, I feel that ...
b1_b2_upgrade.tip: 'I think' is Band 5. 'In my view' is Band 7+. Small change, big impact.

b1_b2_upgrade.b1: There are many reasons for this.
b1_b2_upgrade.tip: Generic umbrellas score low. Always include the TOPIC in your umbrella sentence.
'The other contributing factor' avoids mechanical numbering and sounds natural.
'Clearly' is the examiners' favourite Link opener. It closes a paragraph with authority.
'In conclusion' is the standard in every examiner essay. Don't try to be creative here.

b1_b2_upgrade.b1: Some people think X. Other people think Y.
b1_b2_upgrade.b2: While some believe ..., others feel that ...
b1_b2_upgrade.tip: Combining both views into ONE complex sentence shows grammatical range — a key Band 7+ skill.

upgrade_ladder.demo: A junk food diet inevitably leads to weight gain.
upgrade_ladder.tip: "Leads to" = #1 causation verb. Direction: X → Y.

upgrade_ladder.demo: The majority of crime stems from drug and alcohol addiction.
upgrade_ladder.tip: "Stems from" traces back to the ROOT cause. Direction: Y ← X.

upgrade_ladder.ctx: This has had a _____ on education.
upgrade_ladder.demo: Our changing lifestyles have had a far-reaching effect on our health.
upgrade_ladder.tip: "Far-reaching" = affects many areas. For WIDE impact.

upgrade_ladder.ctx: Social media has a _____ on mental health.
upgrade_ladder.demo: This has a detrimental effect not only on individuals but on society.

upgrade_ladder.ctx: Investment is _____ to bridge this gap.
upgrade_ladder.demo: Investment is crucial to bridge this gap.
upgrade_ladder.tip: One word swap: "important → crucial." Instant Lexical Resource upgrade.

upgrade_ladder.demo: The anxiety this may create can be severe.
This would dramatically reduce their risk of reoffending.
This would inevitably lead to a reduction in revenue.
upgrade_ladder.tip: "Inevitably" = cannot be avoided. Perfect for Effect sentences.

upgrade_ladder.ctx: The _____ of teenagers use social media.
upgrade_ladder.demo: The vast majority of food outlets are fast food restaurants.
upgrade_ladder.tip: Hedges your claim so examiners see nuance, not over-generalisation.

upgrade_ladder.demo: Individuals may feel compelled to keep up with others.
Many parents foster a disregard for authority, which exacerbates problems.

upgrade_ladder.ctx: Steps must be taken to _____ these energy sources.
upgrade_ladder.demo: The first step must be to phase out extraction and use.

upgrade_ladder.ctx: Crime is a _____ in most countries.
upgrade_ladder.demo: Crime is a pervasive problem in most countries around the world.
